name: 20"x65" Arch Floor Mirror Black - Threshold™: Easel Back, Modern Polystyrene Frame
description:
Get a complete head-to-toe-view of your reflection and add elegant style to your decor with this Faux-Wood Arch Floor Mirror from Threshold™. This rectangular floor mirror features an arched top for a distinct look. Set in a faux-wood frame in a black finish, it blends well with a variety of decor styles. This full-length mirror comes with an easel back for standing support, so you can place it in your living room, bedroom or dressing area for instant display.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
